comment: Oh cool. I updated the app so it would stop telling me to every time I open it, and now all my photos are gray squares. Even better when you click on your new gray squares, it's just a black screen. Thanks so much. Hey they were just the pictures of the only people on earth I love, no biggie right. Maybe I can redraw them from memory using the edit function.
key sentence: photos gray squares, black screen, update the app
the function of activity: This activity allows users to navigate to library/memories/search, cast content, back up photos, favorite items, and access various editing and sharing options.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Share', 'description': 'Share content'}, {'name': 'Settings', 'description': 'Access account and app settings'}, {'name': 'Creations', 'description': 'Create new content'}, {'name': 'Sharing', 'description': 'Share content with others'}, {'name': 'View Memories', 'description': 'View photos of memories.'}, {'name': 'Memories', 'description': 'Access memories'}, {'name': 'Add Memory', 'description': 'Add a new memory.'}]

operations.event: click
